welcome.title: Hi, I'm Cline
welcome.description: I can do all kinds of tasks thanks to breakthroughs in
welcome.descriptionCapabilities: agentic coding capabilities and access to tools that let me create & edit files, explore complex projects, use a browser, and execute terminal commands
welcome.descriptionMcp: I can even use MCP to create new tools and extend my own capabilities.
welcome.signupPrompt: Sign up for an account to get started for free, or use an API key that provides access to models like Claude Sonnet.

homeHeader.lazyTeammateHeading: I guess I'm here to help
homeHeader.defaultHeading: What can I do for you?

suggestedTasks.title: Quick
suggestedTasks.buildNextjsAppDesc: Create a beautiful notetaking app with Next.js and Tailwind
suggestedTasks.craftCliToolDesc: Develop a powerful terminal CLI to automate a cool task
suggestedTasks.developGameDesc: Code a classic Snake game that runs in the browser.

chat.contextHint: Type @ for context, / for slash commands & workflows, hold shift to drag in files/images
chat.planActTooltipPlanAction: gather information to architect a plan
chat.unsupportedFileError: Files other than images are currently disabled

browserSession.clineWantsBrowser: Cline wants to use the browser:

error.loggedOut: Whoops looks like you're logged out – click below to sign in
error.powershellIssue: It seems like you're having Windows PowerShell issues, please see this
error.diffError: The model used search patterns that don't match anything in the file. Retrying...

subagent.wantsSubagentSingular: Cline wants to use a subagent:

hookMessage.timeoutError: Took longer than 30 seconds. Check for infinite loops or add timeouts to network requests.
hookMessage.validationError: Hook returned invalid JSON. See error details below for more information.

userMessage.restoreAllTitle: Restore both the chat and workspace files to this checkpoint and send your edited message
userMessage.restoreChatTitle: Restore just the chat to this checkpoint and send your edited message

commandOutput.terminalWarning: This command is running in the VSCode terminal. You can manually stop it using Ctrl+C in the terminal, or switch to Background Execution mode in settings for cancellable commands.
commandOutput.requiresApproval: The model has determined this command requires explicit approval.

chatErrorBoundary.defaultTitle: Something went wrong displaying this content

autoApprove.label: Auto-approve:
autoApprove.description: Let Cline take these actions without asking for approval.
autoApprove.notificationsDescription: Notifications may show abbreviated tool details for safety and privacy.

taskHeader.no: No, keep the task as is
taskHeader.currentTokens: Current tokens used in this request
taskHeader.maxContextWindow: Maximum context window size for this model
taskHeader.viewManageWorktrees: View and manage git worktrees. Great for running parallel Cline tasks.
taskHeader.newWorktreeTooltip: Create a new git worktree and open it in a separate window. Great for running parallel Cline tasks.

contextWindow.clickToSetThreshold: Click on the context window bar to set a new threshold.
contextWindow.autoCondenseDescription: When the context window usage exceeds this threshold, the task will be automatically condensed.

focusChain.newStepsMessage: New steps will be generated if you continue the task
focusChain.clickToEdit: Click to edit to-do list in file
focusChain.scrollToMessage: Click to scroll to your message

featureTips.doubleCheckCompletion: Enable "Double-Check Completion" in settings to have Cline verify its work before finishing a task.
featureTips.clinerulesFile: Add a .clinerules file to your project root to give Cline project-specific instructions.
featureTips.planMode: Switch to Plan Mode to discuss and plan an approach before Cline takes action.
featureTips.useAtContext: Use @ in the chat input to add files, folders, or URLs as context for your task.
featureTips.mcpServers: Set up MCP Servers to give Cline access to external tools and APIs.
featureTips.checkpoints: Cline creates checkpoints after changes — you can always restore to a previous state.
featureTips.compactCommand: Use /compact to condense long conversations and free up context window space.
featureTips.autoApprove: Enable auto-approve for read-only tools like file reads to speed up exploration.
featureTips.quoteButton: Use the quote button to select text from Cline's response and reference it in your reply.
featureTips.dragDropImages: You can drag and drop images into the chat to share screenshots with Cline.
featureTips.browseWebsites: Cline can browse websites — ask it to test your local dev server in the browser.
featureTips.reportBug: Use /reportbug to quickly file a GitHub issue with diagnostic context included.
featureTips.disableTips: You can disable these tips in Settings → Features → "Feature Tips".

stickyUserMessage.clickToScroll: Click to scroll to your message

dify.workflowDescription: Dify workflow - model selection is configured in your Dify application
